item.title: LEGO DUPLO Interactive Adventure Train Set - Toddler Learning Toy for 2+ Year Old Boys & Girls - incl. 14 Track Pieces Action Bricks with Sound and 4 Figures - 10427
item.description:
There’s a deal LEGO DUPLO Interactive Adventure Train Set - Toddler Learning Toy for 2+ Year Old Boys & Girls - incl. 14 Track Pieces Action Bricks with Sound and 4 Figures - 10427 here:

ℹ️:

  • INTERACTIVE APP – The free LEGO DUPLO Interactive Trains app lets kids record their own sounds and drive the train toy using a portable electronic device
  • INTERACTIVE TRAIN SET – Toddlers embark on a stimulating learning journey with the LEGO DUPLO Interactive Adventure Train toy for 2+ year old boys and girls
  • 5 INTERACTIVE DUPLO BRICKS – Great for use as a Montessori toy, the train set sparks kids imaginations with lights and sounds; requires 4x AAA batteries (1.5V or 1.2V rechargeable, not included)
  • TODDLER LEARNING TOYS – With this building set, preschoolers use problem-solving skills to pack items and build toy train tracks to the station, park, or beach
  • WHATS IN THE BOX? – Includes 4 DUPLO figures, a toy train that plays lights and sounds, 3 destination builds and 14 LEGO train track pieces
  • GREAT FOR MONTESSORI – LEGO DUPLO build-and-rebuild train toys are designed to develop toddlers’ patience, focus, perseverance and creative problem-solving skills
  • GIFT FOR TODDLERS – This LEGO DUPLO construction toy makes a fun gift for 2+ year old boys and girls who like train sets and fun interactive toys

🛒 Buy it now!!

item.title: LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Exotic Parrot to Frog to Fish Animal Figures Building Toy Creative Toys for Kids Aged 7 and up 31136
item.description:
There’s a deal LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Exotic Parrot to Frog to Fish Animal Figures Building Toy Creative Toys for Kids Aged 7 and up 31136 here:

ℹ️:

  • Kids can choose their building adventure with 3 LEGO Creator animal figures or fire up their imagination and create a new animal with the bricks
  • The easy-to-follow picture guide makes construction easy and fun, plus digital building instructions can also be found in the LEGO Builder app
  • This LEGO Creator 3in1 animal toy set features 3 animals for kids 7+ years old: a parrot toy perched on a branch, a playful frog and a toy fish
  • The parrot can be transformed into a toy frog with posable legs or into a LEGO fish with movable fins and a seabed for creative adventures
  • With details such as the parrots branch covered in flowers, this building toy set will look awesome on display in kids rooms when play is over
  • The toy parrot is richly coloured and comes with jointed parts that allow it to rotate its body on the branch and move its wings and tail
  • The range of 3in1 LEGO Creator building toys is full of fun; dont miss the Space Shuttle (31134) and Beach Camper Van (31138) sets

🛒 Buy it now!!

item.description:
You’ve got LEGO Technic 42111 La Dodge Charger de Dom Maquette Voiture de Course a Construire Fast and Furious Idée Cadeau at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • Re-enact Dominic Toretto’s cool stunts from The Fast and The Furious movies then display the car in the famous wheelstand position
  • Check out the V8 engine, plus two nitro bottles for extra power. If things get too hot, there’s a fire extinguisher in the cockpit
  • Dom’s Dodge Charger race car is an awesome replica model of the classic muscle car, inspired by the original 1970 Dodge Charger R/T
  • Authentic features let fans recreate the thrill of driving the real car, with moving pistons, suspension, steering system and air blower
  • Makes the ideal gift for any car, Fast & Furious enthusiast, boy, girl man or woman; perfectly sized to create an awesome display piece to show off
  • Number of Pieces: 1,077

item.title: LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure
item.description:
You’ve got LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • This LEGO Creator 3in1 set, featuring a pirate ship toy, makes a great birthday gift for a son or daughter, or Christmas present for swashbuckling kids, boys and girls aged 9+ years old
  • This LEGO Creator set for aspiring pirates features 3 models in 1: a classic Pirate Ship toy, rustic Pirates’ Inn and mysterious Skull Island
  • Accessories include a map, torch, pistol, treasure chest, telescope, goblets, 2 sabres and many more details, like flags, barrels and lanterns
  • Includes 2 pirate minifigures in full costume with sabres, 1 deckhand sailor plus buildable shark and bird figures and a skeleton figure
  • On the spooky island, a handle allows kids to open and close the skull, or they can hide the gold in the Pirate Inn’s secret hidey-hole
  • The pirate ship toy features an opening roof and wall to access the cabin, a foretop to keep watch for targets and rotating cannons for more fun

item.title: LEGO Friends Paisley s House Dolls House Toy for Girls and Boys 4 Plus Years Old Playset with Accessories Birthday Gift Idea 2023 Series Characters 41724
item.description:
You’ve got LEGO Friends Paisley s House Dolls House Toy for Girls and Boys 4 Plus Years Old Playset with Accessories Birthday Gift Idea 2023 Series Characters 41724 at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • This toy dolls house has rooms on the upper floor that can be separated, plus a cosy outdoor area with a hutch for the pet bunny figure
  • This LEGO 4 set includes dolls house accessories: a brush, a guitar, kitchen utensils, food and more so children can invent their own stories
  • After exploring the house, kids can join Paisley in the garden where she loves to compose music on her guitar and say hello to pet bunny Melody
  • A great birthday gift idea or a special treat for kids aged 4 plus years old who love dolls houses and imaginative play with creative toys
  • Features a 2-storey dolls house toy for kids aged 4 with removable top floor and lots of accessories, plus Paisley, Ella and Jonathan mini-dolls
  • The set features a starter brick for quick building plus instructions via the LEGO Builder app with tools to zoom and rotate models in 3D
  • Includes 3 LEGO mini-dolls: Paisley, a shy girl who loves music, Ella and Jonathan, part of the new generation of LEGO Friends 2023 characters

item.description:
There’s a deal LEGO 42105 Technic Catamaran here:

  • For the first time ever both models float on water - check this classic 2-hull catamaran design, working sails, daggerboards and rudder!
  • Fans can angle the sails for a racing position, raise and lower the 2 daggerboards to maximise stability, then use the rudder to steer.
